bird.name: Chestnut-capped brushfinch
bird.summary: The chestnut-capped brushfinch (Arremon brunneinucha) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. It is found…

locations.name: 阿苏艾省
locations.summary: 阿苏艾（西班牙語：Azuay）是厄瓜多尔的一个省，于1824年6月25日成立，面积7,700平方千米，人口599,546。首府昆卡。阿苏艾省位于厄瓜多尔中南部高原地区，有航班来往基多和瓜亚基尔，泛美公路亦经过该省。省内设有全国最大的水力发…

locations.name: Pine–oak forest
locations.summary: Pine–oak forest, pine–oak woodland, or oak–pine forest is a group of similar of ecosystems, primarily found in North an…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Chestnut-capped brushfinch
relations.evidence: inornatus: western slope of Ecuador's Andes from southwestern Chimborazo Province south to Azuay Province The chestnut-capped brushfinch inhabits the understory of a variety of humid to wet forest types in the upper tropical and lower temperate zones. In northern Central America these include pine-oak forest and cloudforest at elevations between . In Costa Rica in addition to wet subtropical forest it occurs in mature secondary forest; in elevation it ranges there between . In Panama it mostly occurs above . In Venezuela it ranges between in the Andes and between in the Coastal Range. In Colombia it favors forest with a bamboo understory; it ranges in elevation between . In Ecuador it mostly occurs between and in Peru between and locally to
